productDisplayName: Red Tape Men Casual White Shoes
description: Take casual dressing to the next level with these white leather shoes from red tape. Stylish to the hilt and giving absolute comfort to the feet, they're a perfect addition to your wardrobe. Team them with jeans, cargo pants or shorts and a stylish polo t-shirt for that cool look. Upper Full grain textured leather upper for maximum durability, comfort, breathability and style Leather toe cap and heel cup for enhanced protection to the forefoot and back foot Rounded and padded collar with a leather outer and meshed fabric inner for in-step comfort Leather tongue with a fabric inner lining for maximum comfort, style and breathability Stitch detailing for midfoot support, enhanced durability and style Midsole PU midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protection Complete fabric inner lining for maximum breathability Padded fabric footbed for all-day comfort Outsole Durable rubber outsole vertically textured to offer maximum grip on smooth surfaces PU lining in the form of an '8', acting as the toe and heel foxing and running along the midfoot for enhanced support shoe care Wipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner to maintain shine Do not store in direct sunlight
